narrative.canopy: The lowest of the five origins. No altitude to shape the growing conditions, no elevation to create a microclimate. Warm and humid nearly year-round. Cultivation here works with heat and wet, not against them.
narrative.land: Small household plots, ginger grown alongside whatever else is already being raised. Not a monoculture. One of several things in the same ground at the same time. This mixed character is partly why it tastes the way it does.
narrative.hand: The ginger is lifted from the soil by a household that has grown it alongside everything else — not as a monoculture, not as a commercial operation, but as part of a small, mixed plot tended the way a home is tended. The care is the same.
